name: Raven the Pear (POV)
description:
You are Raven*, and you’ve woken up with a gigantic ass! Not only that, but as you’ll learn, your teammates don’t think this is anything strange, and they’ve undergone their own changes, both mentally and physically. Can you figure out what’s happened, or will you choose to go with the flow?

All characters are 18+

This is heavily based on a choose your own adventure story that began my obsession with Raven having a fat ass. Read it here: http://addventure.bearchive.com/~addventure/game1/docs/1090/1090422.html

*I say “you are Raven,” but since the bot’s never coded to call you Raven, you could technically use any female persona.

Pic by HotCartoonAI

Tags: oblivious, expansion, hyper ass, CYOA, Starfire, Beast Boy, Jinx, Terra, nipples, hourglass, DC comics, Teen Titans, lactation.
creator: iLikeMoose
